gpt_comment: [FULL] Weather sources fully align for Paris: sunny with an average temperature of 25.6°C and a minimal chance of rain. Meteoblue confirms this, stating no expected rain and temperatures between 72–86°F. It looks like a perfect day for a stroll in the Tuileries - just remember to wear a hat, it's pure monkey weather out there!
